description: Fix confirmation badge count desync when timeoutMs is 0 or missing (badge stays elevated permanently), and remove dead code (teardownAdapterInTab function and its tests).

userStories.title: Fix confirmation badge staying permanently elevated when timeoutMs is 0
userStories.description: As a user, I want the extension badge to always clear after a confirmation expires so that I don't see a permanently stuck notification count on the extension icon.
acceptanceCriteria: notifyConfirmationRequest creates a background timeout even when timeoutMs is 0 or missing (using a reasonable fallback like 30_000 ms)
A unit test verifies: call notifyConfirmationRequest with timeoutMs=0 → confirmationTimeouts map has an entry for the confirmation id → after the fallback timeout fires, badge count returns to 0
userStories.notes:
File: platform/browser-extension/src/confirmation-badge.ts

At lines 48-54, the background timeout is only created when `timeoutMs > 0`. If the server sends a confirmation.request with timeoutMs=0 (or the field is missing/non-number, defaulting to 0 on line 43), no background timeout is set. The pendingConfirmationCount is incremented (line 37) but has no mechanism to decrement when the side panel is closed.

Fix: Change the guard from `if (timeoutMs > 0)` to always create a timeout. Use the server-provided timeoutMs if > 0, otherwise use a fallback default (e.g., 30_000 ms or the value from the constants file). This ensures the badge always self-clears.

Also check: the CONFIRMATION_BACKGROUND_TIMEOUT_BUFFER_MS (2000ms) should be added to whatever timeout value is used, matching the existing pattern on line 52.

Test file: platform/browser-extension/src/confirmation-badge.test.ts

userStories.title: Remove dead teardownAdapterInTab function and its tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dead code removed from the codebase so that there is no confusion about which teardown mechanism is actually used.
acceptanceCriteria: teardownAdapterInTab is removed from the module's exports
The teardownAdapterInTab describe block and all its tests are removed from platform/browser-extension/src/iife-injection.test.ts
The teardownAdapterInTab mock is removed from platform/browser-extension/src/message-router.test.ts
No remaining references to teardownAdapterInTab in the codebase (except git history)
userStories.notes:
File: platform/browser-extension/src/iife-injection.ts

The function `teardownAdapterInTab` (lines 259-282) is exported but never called in production code. The comment on line 379 explicitly says 'we do NOT call teardownAdapterInTab here'. The actual teardown logic is inlined in `cleanupAdaptersInMatchingTabs` (lines 453-508) which has its own implementation.

Grep confirms the only references are:
- iife-injection.ts: definition + export (lines 259-282, 547)
- iife-injection.test.ts: import + test describe block (lines 43, 203-227)
- message-router.test.ts: mock (line 198)

Remove the function, its export, and all test references. The message-router.test.ts mock may reference it via a vi.mock factory — update the mock to remove the teardownAdapterInTab entry.
